offer: For Amazon sellers processing 20–50 orders/month, inaccurate sales projections cause stockouts and lost sales opportunities. We provide data-driven forecasts instead of manual spreadsheets and guesswork.
problem: Inaccurate sales projections leading to stockouts and lost sales opportunities.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
